commands.name: help
commands.details: Displays a list of all available commands.

commands.name: portfolio
commands.details: Shows all game projects in the portfolio.

commands.name: skills
commands.details: Shows programming languages, tools, and expertise areas.

commands.name: contact
commands.details: Displays email and social media links.

commands.name: whoami
commands.details: Displays basic profile about the developer.

commands.name: status
commands.details: Shows current working status and recent activities.

commands.name: git log --oneline
commands.details: Displays all projects in reverse chronological order (newest first).

commands.name: git status
commands.details: Shows the current development status of projects.

commands.name: git show [project-name]
commands.details: Shows detailed information about a specific project. Use: git show [project-name]
